title: Lesson 62: (Grammar) - yes?; no?; isn't it?; is it?; or; whether or not; ...

intro_cards.title: Question Particle: か
intro_cards.body:
か at the end of a sentence turns it into a yes/no question. In polite speech, no rising intonation is needed.

• これは本ですか。(Is this a book?)
• 日本語が話せますか。(Can you speak Japanese?)

In casual speech, か alone can sound harsh. Use rising intonation or の instead:
• いくの？(Are you going?)

か can also embed a question inside a sentence:
• 何があるか知りません。(I don't know what there is.)
